title: Explicit command execution context indicator in skill handoff protocols
context: During FEAT-010, we recognized that manual command handoffs in skill blocks were ambiguous regarding their execution context (project root vs. task worktree).
content: We decided to establish a strict syntax protocol requiring all fenced command lines in skill handoff blocks to be explicitly prefixed with [ROOT] or [WORKTREE:<TASK_ID>]. We also introduced a pytest regression scanner in the test suite to statically parse all SKILL.md handoff blocks, guaranteeing that no command is presented to agents or humans without a clear prefix indicator.
anti_patterns: Avoid omitting the execution context prefix in any fenced command lines within the closing handoff blocks, which leads to ambiguity for humans and downstream orchestrators.
